loyaltyProgram.title: Loyalty Program
loyaltyProgram.subtitle: Manage your loyalty card and program settings
loyaltyProgram.configureProgram: Set up your loyalty program rules and data collection
loyaltyProgram.qrCodeHint: QR code downloads are available in the scanner app
loyaltyProgram.dataCollectionDescription: Collect this information when customers sign up for their loyalty card.
loyaltyProgram.anonymousModeNote: Note: Collecting no data enables anonymous mode - customers can sign up without providing any information.
loyaltyProgram.anonymousModeWarning: Anonymous mode is active. Customers won't need to fill any form, but you won't be able to identify them. They won't be able to recover a lost card or sync across devices, and you won't be able to contact them for marketing.

overview.title: Loyalty Program
overview.subtitle: Your program at a glance

steps.configureDescription: Name your program, choose how many stamps, and set a reward your customers will love.
steps.createDescription: Make it yours — pick colors, add your logo, and create a card that matches your brand.
steps.activateDescription: Activate your card so customers can start collecting stamps in their wallet.
steps.customizeDescription: Personalize the messages customers see when they earn stamps or unlock rewards.
steps.backFieldsDescription: Add an address, website, phone number or email that will appear on the back of every card you create — keeping things consistent and saving you time. You can always opt out when designing a new card.
steps.firstCustomerDescription: Share your signup link or QR code — it only takes one scan to get started.

overview.programLinkDescription: Share this with customers to download their loyalty card
overview.scanToAdd: Scan to add loyalty card to wallet
overview.notificationsDescription: Push notification templates and broadcast messages

loyaltyProgram.stampsDescription: How many stamps customers need to earn the reward
loyaltyProgram.rewardSubtitle: What customers get when they complete their card
loyaltyProgram.rewardDescriptionPlaceholder: Get a free coffee after collecting all stamps
loyaltyProgram.programDetailsSubtitle: The basics of your loyalty program
loyaltyProgram.stampsTypeDesc: Customers collect stamps with each visit. Simple and familiar.
loyaltyProgram.pointsTypeDesc: Customers earn points per purchase. Flexible redemption.
loyaltyProgram.tieredTypeDesc: Bronze, Silver, Gold levels with increasing perks.

dataFields.name: Name
dataFields.nameDescription: Personalize their card and help you identify customers
dataFields.emailDescription: Enable pass recovery, email campaigns, and customer lookup
dataFields.phoneDescription: Enable SMS notifications and campaigns (coming soon)
